_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the existent tasking, collection, processing, exploitation and dissemination architecture.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of ML model serving patterns, including REST API serving, batch inference, streaming inference, edge deployment, and the latency, throughput, and cost trade-offs of each.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.503), AI-K-016 (AI, cosine: 0.496).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.340). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [architecture, collection, dissemination, existent, exploitation, processing] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, batch, cost, deployment, edge, inference] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.871, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of the existent tasking, collection, processing, exploitation and diss" and "Knowledge of ML model serving patterns, including REST API serving, batch infere" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.505 > STS 0.340 (gap +0.166). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [architecture, collection, dissemination, existent, exploitation, processing]. WIDAI-only: [api, batch, cost, deployment, edge, inference].
